cases.name: Modern Flat brand adaptation
cases.input: One product reference and one approved Modern Flat style reference.
expected: red accent is limited to 10 percent visual weight

cases.name: Silver-Gold premium object
cases.input: One geometry reference and one approved Silver-Gold anchor.
expected: chrome and jewelry styling are excluded

cases.name: Obsidian Gold isolated icon
cases.input: One vault geometry reference and one approved Obsidian Gold style anchor.
expected: gold is no more than 25 percent
prompt ends with The background is black.
stone texture and HDR are excluded

cases.name: Complex staged generation
cases.input: Style reference, subject reference, and composition sketch for a multi-layer scene.
expected: composition is approved before material refinement
geometry is approved before lighting refinement
each iteration changes one scene layer

cases.name: Local material correction
cases.input: Existing candidate has correct composition but chrome-like material.
expected: composition and geometry are listed as preserved
only surface roughness and reflection behavior change

cases.name: Missing usable reference
cases.input: User asks to edit an image that is not present.
expected: the user is asked to upload or identify the image
no invented reference ID is created

cases.name: Conflicting reference roles
cases.input: Two style references define incompatible materials and backgrounds without priority.
expected: one primary style reference must be selected

cases.name: Delivery regression
cases.input: Generation tool reports success but no image is visible in the final response.
expected: the task is not reported as complete

cases.name: Forbidden Obsidian environment
cases.input: Prompt adds a luxury office, reflective floor, and graphite gradient background.
expected: the correction preserves the object silhouette

cases.name: Generated logo rejection
cases.input: Candidate includes an AI-generated Finuslugi logo.
expected: candidate is rejected regardless of score
approved logo asset is added after generation
